question: What owner-only representative evidence horizon and canaries will prove that INSIGHTS adds value over raw Budget Position inspection without false high-severity signals?
context: Before planning, build an ignored owner-only time-separated evaluation manifest over representative corrected LEDGER/BUDGET states without copying values, filenames, or report payloads into Git, Lex, logs, or ordinary output. It must cover sparse/zero periods, refunds, front-loaded and recurring spend, plan changes, archived categories, Uncategorized and Unbudgeted spend, corrections, and seeded disclosure canaries.
